name: Series A Label (Baseline)
helpText: Legend label for the first datasource (expected/baseline).

name: Series B Label (Current)
helpText: Legend label for the second datasource (actual).

name: Display Unit (e.g. M, kWh)
helpText: Unit suffix appended to values (M for millions, K for thousands, etc.).

name: Currency Symbol
helpText: Currency prefix used in axis title and tooltip (e.g. $, LKR, EUR).

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for bar values and variance badges.

name: Good Performance Logic
helpText: Determines whether exceeding the baseline is positive (revenue) or negative (cost). Controls badge and status dot colors.

name: Max Months to Show
helpText: Maximum number of monthly bar pairs displayed. Older months are trimmed first.

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the card border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Text
helpText: Static tooltip override. Leave blank for auto-generated dynamic tooltip with live variance data.
